title: Light To My Feet

sections.label: Intro
lines: Your Word is a lamp to my feet,
A light on the path I tread.
Through trials and shadows deep,
It leads where Your love is spread.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I seek You with all my soul,
Let me not stray from Your call.
In the depth of my heart, You reside,
Your wisdom guides me through it all.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Teach me the ways of Your truth,
Reveal the wonders of old.
In the storms, Your promises soothe,
A shelter, steadfast and bold.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your Word is a lamp to my feet,
A light on the path I tread.
Through the valleys, it makes me complete,
Your truth is my daily bread.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Though the wicked lay their snares,
Your precepts hold me secure.
I stand firm, in awe of Your care,
In Your justice, I find what is pure.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Oh, how I love Your decrees,
They are life, they are peace.
I will meditate on Your laws,
Day and night, my soul’s release.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: When despair overtakes my heart,
Your statutes revive my soul.
In Your mercy, I’m made whole,
Your commands set me apart.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Your faithfulness stands through the ages,
Your Word never fades away.
Through the mountains, the storms, and the raging,
Your promises remain my stay.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Teach me the ways of Your truth,
Reveal the wonders of old.
In the storms, Your promises soothe,
A shelter, steadfast and bold.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your Word is a lamp to my feet,
A light on the path I tread.
Through the valleys, it makes me complete,
Your truth is my daily bread.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Your statutes are righteous and true,
A joy to the weary heart.
Even when darkness closes in view,
Your guidance will not depart.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Your hands made me and shaped me,
Oh, teach me to trust Your will.
Though the world may forsake me,
Your Word will hold me still.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your Word is a lamp to my feet,
A light on the path I tread.
Through the valleys, it makes me complete,
Your truth is my daily bread.

sections.label: Post-Chorus
lines: (A lamp to my feet, a light to my way...)
Your Word will forever stay.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Forever I walk in Your light,
Your Word, my eternal guide.
In Your promises, I will delight,
Your truth will ever abide.

epigraph: Thy word is a lamp unto my feet
